title: sageretia lanceolata
intro: Sageretia lanceolata, also known as the variegated sweetleaf or sweetleaf, is a plant species in the family Rhamnaceae. It is a deciduous shrub native to China, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and stems. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which provide various health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. Sageretia lanceolata is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, and its leaves are prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
